title: Preclinical evaluation of novel FGFR2-targeting peptide probes for PET imaging and intraoperative navigation in gastric Cancer.
snippet: Fibroblast growth factor receptor 2 (FGFR2) is extensively acknowledged as a clinically significant biomarker across various cancer types, exhibiting elevated expression levels in numerous malignancies, with particularly pronounced overexpression in gastric cancer. In the present study, we refined a radioligand, [Ga]Ga-DOTA-PF, through modification of FGFR2...
